directions_tried.name: Phase 1: Foundation & Disambiguation
directions_tried.outcome: Framework extracted. Three-level classification. SED comparison = category error.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Phase freedom = realm selection hypothesis
directions_tried.outcome: Hypothesis partially refuted. Coincidental match at N=2. Different topologies and scaling.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: What does Barandes add?
directions_tried.outcome: Structural insight POSITIVE (complex numbers, Tsirelson, phase-realm). Computational/predictive NEGATIVE.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3: Adversarial Review & Verdict
directions_tried.outcome: Tsirelson claim PARTIALLY SURVIVES (circular math, novel framing). Level 2+ classification confirmed.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Extract mathematical framework from Barandes papers
explorations_completed.key_finding: ISP = Stinespring dilation for stochastic matrices. Born rule definitional.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Compare Barandes to SED, Nelson, consistent histories
Compute phase freedom vs realm selection for N=2
explorations_completed.key_finding: Dimensions match (coincidental), topologies differ, breaks at N>2.
CHSH/Tsirelson strongest claim. No computational advantage. Structural insight only.
Partially circular. Level 2+ confirmed. Open question: non-unistochastic Tsirelson.
